title: Abbasso la miseria!
writer: Mario Monicelli, Nicola Fausto Neroni, Gennaro Righelli
actors: Anna Magnani, Nino Besozzi, Virgilio Riento
plot: The two drivers Giovanni and Gaetano are friends. Gaetano, bold and ruthless, thrives in the black market, while Giovanni, who is a naive and fundamentally honest worker from the North of Italy, cannot get any profit and his wife,...
